mapper.select:
SELECT DISTINCT p.project_code, p.project_name, p.description, p.created_on, p.status, c.code_name, p.user_code, u.name, u.phone, u.email FROM projects p JOIN common_code c ON p.status = c.code_id JOIN users u ON p.user_code = u.user_code WHERE p.status IN ('OD1', 'OD3') -- OD2(삭제) 제외
AND ( p.user_code = #{userCode} -- 자기가 관리자인 프로젝트 OR EXISTS ( -- 프로젝트 구성원 SELECT 1 FROM project_role_user pru WHERE pru.project_code = p.project_code AND pru.user_code = #{userCode} ) OR EXISTS ( -- 프로젝트 그룹 구성원 SELECT 1 FROM gr_pro_role gpr JOIN group_member gm ON gpr.gr_code = gm.gr_code WHERE gpr.project_code = p.project_code AND gm.user_code = #{userCode} ) ) -- OD3(종료)는 관리자만 조회 가능 AND (p.status != 'OD3' OR p.user_code = #{userCode})
ORDER BY CASE WHEN p.status = 'OD3' THEN 2 ELSE 1 END ASC, p.project_code DESC
SELECT role_code, role_name, explanation, admin_ck FROM role WHERE role_name NOT LIKE '%-delete' ORDER BY admin_ck, role_code
SELECT project_code ,project_name ,created_on FROM projects WHERE status = 'OD1' ORDER BY project_code
SELECT user_code ,employee_no ,name ,phone ,email ,created_at ,last_login_at ,is_lock FROM users WHERE is_lock = 0
SELECT group_code, gr_name, description FROM "GROUP" WHERE gr_name NOT LIKE '%-delete'
mapper.insert:
SELECT NVL(MAX(project_code), 0) + 1 FROM projects
INSERT INTO projects ( project_code, project_name, description, created_on, status, user_code ) VALUES ( #{projectCode}, #{projectName}, #{description}, SYSDATE, #{status}, #{userCode} )

SELECT NVL(MAX(status_code), 0) + 1 FROM status
INSERT INTO status ( status_code, project_code, code_id, sort_no ) VALUES ( #{statusCode}, #{projectCode}, #{codeId}, #{sortNo} )

SELECT NVL(MAX(mapp_code), 0) + 1 FROM project_role_user
INSERT INTO project_role_user ( mapp_code, project_code, user_code, role_code ) VALUES ( #{mappCode}, #{projectCode}, #{userCode}, #{roleCode} )

SELECT NVL(MAX(gr_pro_code), 0) + 1 FROM gr_pro_role
INSERT INTO gr_pro_role ( gr_pro_code, gr_code, project_code, role_code ) VALUES ( #{grProCode}, #{grCode}, #{projectCode}, #{roleCode} )
mapper.select:
SELECT user_code, name, MAX(admin) AS admin, #{category} AS category, MAX(rd_rol) AS rd_rol, MAX(wr_rol) AS wr_rol, MAX(mo_rol) AS mo_rol, MAX(del_rol) AS del_rol FROM ( -- 1. 사용자에게 직접 부여된 개별 권한 SELECT u.user_code, u.name, CASE WHEN r.admin_ck = 'Y' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS admin, ra.rd_rol, ra.wr_rol, ra.mo_rol, ra.del_rol FROM users u LEFT JOIN project_role_user pru ON u.user_code = pru.user_code LEFT JOIN projects p ON pru.project_code = p.project_code -- 추가 LEFT JOIN role r ON pru.role_code = r.role_code LEFT JOIN role_authority ra ON r.role_code = ra.role_code AND ra.category = #{category} WHERE u.user_code = #{userCode} AND (p.status NOT IN ('OD2', 'OD3') OR p.status IS NULL) -- 추가
UNION
-- 2. 그룹을 통해 부여된 권한 SELECT u.user_code, u.name, CASE WHEN r.admin_ck = 'Y' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS admin, ra.rd_rol, ra.wr_rol, ra.mo_rol, ra.del_rol FROM users u JOIN group_member gm ON u.user_code = gm.user_code JOIN gr_pro_role gpr ON gm.gr_code = gpr.gr_code JOIN projects p ON gpr.project_code = p.project_code -- 추가 JOIN "GROUP" g ON gm.gr_code = g.group_code -- 추가 JOIN role r ON gpr.role_code = r.role_code LEFT JOIN role_authority ra ON r.role_code = ra.role_code AND ra.category = #{category} WHERE u.user_code = #{userCode} AND gpr.project_code > 0 -- 추가 AND g.gr_name NOT LIKE '%-delete' -- 추가 AND p.status NOT IN ('OD2', 'OD3') -- 추가 ) combined_auth GROUP BY user_code, name

SELECT user_code, name, project_code, category, MAX(admin) AS admin, MAX(rd_rol) AS rd_rol, MAX(wr_rol) AS wr_rol, MAX(mo_rol) AS mo_rol, MAX(del_rol) AS del_rol FROM ( -- 1. 사용자 개별 권한 (카테고리 포함) SELECT u.user_code, u.name, ra.category, pru.project_code, CASE WHEN r.admin_ck = 'Y' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS admin, ra.rd_rol, ra.wr_rol, ra.mo_rol, ra.del_rol, ra.ra_code FROM users u LEFT JOIN project_role_user pru ON u.user_code = pru.user_code LEFT JOIN projects p ON pru.project_code = p.project_code -- 추가 LEFT JOIN role r ON pru.role_code = r.role_code LEFT JOIN role_authority ra ON r.role_code = ra.role_code WHERE u.user_code = #{userCode} AND ra.category IS NOT NULL AND p.status NOT IN ('OD2', 'OD3')
UNION ALL
-- 2. 그룹 소속 권한 (카테고리 포함) SELECT u.user_code, u.name, ra.category, gpr.project_code, CASE WHEN r.admin_ck = 'Y' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS admin, ra.rd_rol, ra.wr_rol, ra.mo_rol, ra.del_rol, ra.ra_code FROM users u JOIN group_member gm ON u.user_code = gm.user_code JOIN gr_pro_role gpr ON gm.gr_code = gpr.gr_code JOIN projects p ON gpr.project_code = p.project_code JOIN "GROUP" g ON gm.gr_code = g.group_code JOIN role r ON gpr.role_code = r.role_code LEFT JOIN role_authority ra ON r.role_code = ra.role_code WHERE u.user_code = #{userCode} AND ra.category IS NOT NULL AND gpr.project_code > 0 AND g.gr_name NOT LIKE '%-delete' AND p.status NOT IN ('OD2', 'OD3') ) combined_auth WHERE project_code > 0 GROUP BY user_code, name, project_code, category ORDER BY max(ra_code) ASC

SELECT p.project_code, p.project_name, p.description, TO_CHAR(p.created_on, 'YYYY-MM-DD') as created_on, p.status, p.user_code, u.name as user_name FROM projects p JOIN users u ON p.user_code = u.user_code WHERE p.project_code = #{projectCode}

SELECT pru.mapp_code, pru.project_code, pru.user_code, u.name as user_name, u.email, pru.role_code, r.role_name FROM project_role_user pru JOIN users u ON pru.user_code = u.user_code JOIN role r ON pru.role_code = r.role_code WHERE pru.project_code = #{projectCode} AND pru.project_code > 0

SELECT gpr.gr_pro_code, gpr.gr_code, g.gr_name, gpr.project_code, gpr.role_code, r.role_name FROM gr_pro_role gpr JOIN "GROUP" g ON gpr.gr_code = g.group_code JOIN role r ON gpr.role_code = r.role_code WHERE gpr.project_code = #{projectCode} AND gpr.project_code > 0
SELECT mapp_code, project_code, user_code, role_code FROM project_role_user WHERE user_code = #{userCode} AND project_code = #{projectCode} * -1
SELECT gr_pro_code, gr_code, project_code, role_code FROM gr_pro_role WHERE gr_code = #{grCode} AND project_code = #{projectCode} * -1

SELECT ad.file_detail_code , ad.file_code , ad.original_name , ad.stored_name , ad.path , ad.mime_type , ad.size_bytes , ad.is_used FROM attachments_detail ad JOIN attachments a ON a.file_code = ad.file_code JOIN ( SELECT file_code FROM issues WHERE project_code = #{newProjectCode} UNION SELECT file_code FROM notices WHERE project_code = #{newProjectCode} ) ref ON ref.file_code = a.file_code

SELECT DISTINCT u.user_code, u.name AS name FROM vw_user_auth vua JOIN projects p ON vua.project_code = p.project_code JOIN users u ON p.user_code = u.user_code -- 프로젝트 테이블의 담당자 ID와 사용자 테이블 조인 WHERE vua.user_code = #{userCode} -- '본인'의 user_code AND ( vua.status = 'OD1' OR (vua.status = 'OD3' AND vua.admin_ck = 'Y') )
